Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Christoph Scheuch. Author, maintainer, copyright holder.

  • Stefan Voigt. Author, copyright holder.

  • Patrick Weiss. Author, copyright holder.

  • Maximilian Mücke. Contributor.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Scheuch, Voigt, and Weiss (2023). Tidy Finance with R (1st ed.). Chapman and Hall/CRC. https://doi.org/10.1201/b23237.

@Book{,
  title = {Tidy Finance with R},
  author = {Christoph Scheuch and Stefan Voigt and Patrick Weiss},
  year = {2023},
  publisher = {Chapman and Hall/CRC},
  edition = {1st},
  url = {https://www.tidy-finance.org/r/index.html},
